extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE survived late positioning chaos and launched with 200m to win imperiously after FABBRO hardened finale for SAGAN.
tactical_patterns: FABBRO deliberately spiked finale to drop sprinters for SAGAN, backfired when DÉMARE survived but SAGAN couldn't finish.
Headwind final 50km neutralized breakaway threat completely despite 9.5min max gap, Bora work rate minimal until late.
DÉMARE regained lost positions inside final 2km before launching, elite bunch positioning recovery skill under pressure crucial.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: demonstrated superior tactical recovery and explosive sprint finish despite being dropped in positioning chaos
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: only 8th despite FABBRO's leadout tactics designed specifically for him, losing Maglia Ciclamino indicates poor form
rider_signals.FABBRO Matteo: neutral: attempted aggressive leadout to drop sprinters but failed to deliver result for protected rider
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: retained pink jersey comfortably but experienced minor mechanical hiccup inside final 50km
rider_signals.WHELAN James: positive: strongest of four breakaway riders on KOM climb despite being second-year pro
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: podium finish indicates resilience through technical finale when most sprinters were distanced
